---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or issue with the tools
title: "[BUG] Brief description of the issue"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Enter '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened instead.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- **Tool:** NovelWriter/BookEditor/BookDecomposer/HerbalBookForge
- **Browser:** Chrome/Firefox/Safari/Edge (include version)
- **Operating System:** Windows/macOS/Linux (include version)
- **API Provider:** xAI/other

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here, such as:
- Error messages in browser console
- API response errors
- Steps you've tried to fix it

## Checklist
- [ ] I have checked that this issue hasn't been reported before
- [ ] I have tried clearing browser cache and cookies
- [ ] I have tested in multiple browsers
- [ ] I have read the relevant documentation
